_doc: WO-4 official graph-decl transport fixture. It is stop-defaulted and must not be fired by the checker. The deterministic adapter:local execution proof lives in building_operator_driver0.
task: Prove one exact editable-work route: work attempt 1, two QA siblings attempt 1, closure attempt 1 emits one non-binding implementation_gap, Link reroutes to work under budget 1, both QA siblings replay at attempt 2, and closure attempt 2 returns transition_concern_evidence null. This declaration is a compatibility-transport fixture; do not infer product success or provider reliability from assembly or checker proof.

nodes.work_statement:
## Deliverables
D1: Modify only project/brick-protocol/wo4-probe/route-byte.txt. If it is absent, write exactly attempt-1 followed by one newline. If its exact content is attempt-1 followed by one newline, append exactly attempt-2 followed by one newline. For any other content, do not normalize it; return the observed mismatch and make no write.
D2: Return the exact observed final bytes and whether this was attempt 1 or attempt 2. Do not commit or push.
## Done Criteria
종료선: D1-D2 complete with the exact byte state recorded.

branches.work_statement: Read project/brick-protocol/wo4-probe/route-byte.txt and the received work step-output. Report the exact bytes and attempt number. Make no files and return transition_concern_evidence null. This lane observes only; it does not choose Movement or judge success.

Read project/brick-protocol/wo4-probe/route-byte.txt and the received work step-output. Report the exact bytes and attribute declarations to Brick, returned evidence to Agent, and adoption to Link. Make no files and return transition_concern_evidence null. This lane observes only; it does not choose Movement or judge success.

nodes.work_statement: Fan in both QA sibling step-outputs. On the first closure attempt, when route-byte.txt contains exactly attempt-1 followed by one newline, return exactly one non-binding transition_concern_evidence with concern_kind implementation_gap, related_boundary_refs ["brick-wo4-n2-closure-reroute-e2e-0710-work"], and ledger-local reason_refs ["work/step-outputs/wo4-n2-closure-reroute-e2e-0710-code-attack-qa-attempt-1/step-output.json"]. On the second closure attempt, only when route-byte.txt contains exactly attempt-1 newline then attempt-2 newline and both received QA sibling refs are attempt-2 refs, return transition_concern_evidence null. Otherwise return the observed mismatch without a false completion claim. Do not choose Movement or judge product success.
